mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_orders (order_id, saga_id, user_id, event_id, total_price, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{sagaId}, #{userId}, #{eventId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO order_items (order_item_id, order_id, ticket_type, quantity, seat_identifier) VALUES (#{orderItemId}, #{orderId}, #{ticketType}, #{quantity}, #{seatIdentifier})
mapper.select: SELECT order_item_id AS orderItemId, order_id AS orderId, ticket_type AS ticketType, quantity, seat_identifier AS seatIdentifier FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
